creator: ahill@classfinder.com
text:
Simon Shapiro has a driver for the DPT RAID boards,  but they
have not been integrated into the source tree,  so everyone who is
using it (and it is a good number) has to apply a patch.

Fix: 

The driver should be integrated into the source tree.  
If there are fears that it is not stable,  it should at least be put into -current.
How-To-Repeat: I'll buy a DPT SmartRAID board for the FreeBSD team.
I'm using a DPT 2144UWRD with 16 MG.  Write me with
where you would like it sent.
